tech_news.title: Toy Story: Retro Roundup, Toy Story 3 Complete Edition announced for Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: Toy Story: Retro Roundup and Toy Story 3 Complete Edition were just revealed for Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch - learn about both here.

tech_news.title: Stuntman Hollywood revealed at Sony State of Play, coming soon to PS5 - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Cars from The Fast and Furious, Back to the Future, and more present.

tech_news.title: ‘Wolverine’ Game Developers Break Down New Footage, X-Men Cameos, ‘Low-Gore’ Option, Claw Combat and How Logan Can Die - Variety
tech_news.description: The 'Wolverine' video game developers break down the new trailer, X-Men cameos, gameplay and more.

tech_news.title: God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5 - The Verge
tech_news.description: At its State of Play showcase event at Summer Game Fest, Sony showed off the next God of War game for the PS5.

tech_news.title: Control Resonant's release date revealed in bombshell Sony State of Play story trailer - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: More looks at what Dylan is up to floods the trailer, for our pleasure.

tech_news.title: The BMW M2 Finally Adds an xDrive AWD Model for 2027 - Road & Track
tech_news.description: The xDrive AWD system chops a few tenths off the 0-60, should make the winter commute easier, and ships exclusively with the eight-speed auto.

tech_news.title: Microsoft testing wearable AI gadget aimed at office workers - BBC
tech_news.description: The company said its own workers are testing a "wearable access badge" and a desktop device.

tech_news.title: Rayman Legends Retold Launching October 1 - Ubisoft
tech_news.description: The reimagined adventure of the beloved 2013 classic features stunning 3D visuals, a new story, thrilling dragon rides, new musical stages, and more.

tech_news.title: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve launches October 2 - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on October 2, publisher Bandai Namco and developer Bandai Namco Aces announced.

tech_news.title: iOS 27 is coming, here are five new features I’m most excited about - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: We’re days away from Apple’s iOS 27 unveiling on June 8 at WWDC. Here are five rumored new features in iOS 27 that I’m most excited about.
